assignments.name: Add_Contact_Picklist_Values_to_Combined_Picklist
assignments.label: Add Contact Picklist Values to Combined Picklist

assignments.name: Add_Opp_Picklist_Values_to_Combined_Picklist
assignments.label: Add Opp Picklist Values to Combined Picklist

assignments.name: Assign_Opp_to_Collection_for_Assignment
assignments.label: Assign Opp to Collection for Assignment

assignments.name: Assign_Opp_to_Matching_Contact_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Opp to Matching Contact Variable

decisions.name: Campaign_Type_going_from_SQL_to_MQL
decisions.label: Campaign Type going from SQL to MQL?

decisions.name: Does_Opp_Have_Matching_Contact_Role
decisions.label: Does Opp Have Matching Contact Role?

decisions.name: Is_There_a_Matching_Pardot_Lead_Assignment
decisions.label: Is There a Matching Pardot Lead Assignment?

decisions.name: Is_There_a_Matching_Pardot_Lead_Assignment_0
decisions.label: Is There a Matching Pardot Lead Assignment?

formulas.description: Append existing opp Description with Contact's Pardot Comments
formulas.name: formAppendedDescription
formEmployeeReferralName
formulas.expression: IF( {!Yes_Update_Exising_Opp}, IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!Get_Lead_Opportunity.Employee_Referral_Name__c})), {!Get_Lead_Opportunity.Employee_Referral_Name__c}, IF(ISPICKVAL({!Get_Contact.LeadSource}, "Employee Referral"), {!Get_Contact.Employee_Referral_Name__c}, "") ), IF(ISPICKVAL({!Get_Contact.LeadSource}, "Employee Referral"), {!Get_Contact.Employee_Referral_Name__c}, "") )

formulas.name: formExistingOppLeadSource
formulas.expression: IF( AND( NOT(ISPICKVAL({!Get_Lead_Opportunity.LeadSource}, "")), NOT(ISPICKVAL({!Get_Contact.LeadSource}, "Employee Referral")) ), TEXT({!Get_Lead_Opportunity.LeadSource}), TEXT({!Get_Contact.LeadSource}) )

formulas.name: formTDNotes
formulas.expression: IF( TEXT({!Get_Contact.Lead_Product_Category__c}) == {!$Label.LPC_Product_Development}, ('Lead Funding: ' + {!Get_Contact.TD_Lead_Funding__c} + ' | Lead Inquiry: ' + {!Get_Contact.TD_Lead_Inquiry__c} + ' | Lead Persona: ' + {!Get_Contact.TD_Lead_Persona__c} + ' | Lead Product Description: ' + {!Get_Contact.TD_Lead_Product_Description__c} + ' | Lead Product Stage: ' + {!Get_Contact.TD_Lead_Product_Stage__c}), '' )

loops.name: Loop_Through_Contact_Product_of_Interest
loops.label: Loop Through Contact Product of Interest

loops.name: Loop_Through_Contact_Roles_on_Opp
loops.label: Loop Through Contact Roles on Opp

loops.name: Loop_Through_Opp_Product_of_Interest
loops.label: Loop Through Opp Product of Interest

recordCreates.name: Create_New_Opp_with_Pardot_Fields
recordCreates.label: Create New Opp with Pardot Fields

recordLookups.name: Get_Lead_Opportunity
recordLookups.label: Get Lead/Opportunity
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 6 AND 7 AND (3 OR 4 OR 5)

recordUpdates.name: Update_Contact_Pardot_Data_Import_to_False_0_0
recordUpdates.label: Update Contact Pardot Data Import to False

recordUpdates.name: Update_Existing_Opp_with_PLA_Fields
recordUpdates.label: Update Existing Opp with PLA Fields
